query:
SELECT
                p.id                AS "id!",
                p.username          AS "username!",
                p.display_name      AS "display_name",
                p.plan              AS "plan!",
                EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1 FROM user_badges ub
                    WHERE ub.user_id = p.id AND ub.badge = 'founding'
                ) AS "is_founding!",
                EXISTS (
                    SELECT 1 FROM user_badges ub
                    WHERE ub.user_id = p.id AND ub.badge = 'official'
                ) AS "is_official!"
            FROM profiles p
            WHERE p.id = $1
